narrative: 150-acre certified-organic leafy greens operation in Salinas Valley. Organic System Plan reviewed by certifier 2026-02-10 — no findings. Three-year clean field history documented for all production blocks. Split-op segregation — physically separate equipment + storage from adjacent conventional. Pre-harvest agricultural water — drip irrigation from filtered municipal source; geometric mean 18 CFU/100 mL E. coli, STV 64 (well within thresholds). Pesticide use limited to NOP-approved synthetics from National List; REI + PHI tracked in app; zero violations. Worker Protection Standard training current for 42 workers; H+S plan + heat-illness plan documented. Recall drill completed 2026-03-05; lot-level traceability tested end-to-end in 2.5 hours. Domesticated/wild animal monitoring shows minimal evidence; deer-fencing intact. GlobalGAP IFA v6 audit scheduled June 2026.
